questions: how to work well in a team?
team e conflict hole ki korbo?
how to be a good team player?
answers: Teamwork is collaborating with others toward a shared goal. It requires communication, trust, respect, and each person contributing their strengths to the group effort.
Good team e kaaj korte clear communication koro, others er opinion respect koro, nijer responsibility nao, ar help offer koro. Ego chere dile team bhalo kore kaaj kore.
Teamwork is important because no one can do everything alone. Diverse perspectives lead to better solutions, shared workload reduces stress, and teams can achieve much more than individuals.
Be a good team player by being reliable, communicating openly, supporting your teammates, being flexible, and celebrating team successes rather than just individual achievements.
